misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Damn, I realize Imu accomplished all this without his Magic Book or even his Crazy Haki. Now imagine the other absurd abilities he has up his sleeve, not to mention his Full Zoan...💀

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 To defend Sanji, Zoro, and everyone else, it was clear they didn't stand a chance; the combo team of Xebec, Roger, Garp, Whitebeard, Big Mom, and Kaido couldn't even do anything. What I
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 To defend Sanji, Zoro, and everyone else, it was clear they didn't stand a chance; the combo team of Xebec, Roger, Garp, Whitebeard, Big Mom, and Kaido couldn't even do anything. What I find more puzzling is why Imu is blocking the hits.

misc.title: I mean dude didn´t care if Rocks and the others attacked him, why he suddely start to block attacks?
misc.text: I mean dude didn´t care if Rocks and the others attacked him, why he suddely start to block attacks?

misc.text: I honestly think that Boruto fans overrate Delta a lot. She’s strong, but I don’t think she would win a fight against prime Madara.
